allow: Bash(node -e "const {loadExamples} = require\('./server/examples'\); const ex = loadExamples\(\); console.log\('Loaded', ex.length, 'examples'\); console.log\('First:', ex[0].company, '/', ex[0].level, '/ subject:', ex[0].subject\);")

Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); console.log\('Has default:', typeof sdk.default\); console.log\('Top-level:', typeof sdk\); console.log\('Constructor name:', sdk.default ? sdk.default.name : sdk.name\);")
